instruction: Saturday morning 10–11am I want to do spring tilling and fertilizing in the backyard — put it on my calendar. Set up the related reminder too.

rule_ref.rule_text: When setting reminders for gardening or seasonal household tasks, must use cadence=weekly (recurring weekly), not once or before_event — the user believes such tasks need ongoing attention and a single reminder is useless.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: Garden stuff and other things that need ongoing attention — set those reminders on a weekly cadence, don't give me a one-shot, I'll forget by the next week.
